subject: DevOps
title: Metrics: Numbers Over Time
description: A fast breakdown of Metrics: Numbers Over Time for builders.

hook.text: Request count: 5,000/sec. Error rate: 2.3%. P99 latency: 450 ms. Numbers tell the story.

buildup.text: Metrics are numeric measurements collected at regular intervals. Cheap to store, fast to query.

discovery.text: Counters count events. Gauges track current values. Histograms show distributions.

twist.text: Metrics show what happened but not why. A latency spike needs logs or traces to explain.

climax.text: Prometheus is the most popular metrics system. It scrapes endpoints and stores time series.

punchline.text: Metrics: fast, cheap, high-level. The first line of defense.

quiz.question: What is the main advantage of metrics?
options: They are cheap to store and fast to query
They explain the root cause of every issue
They replace the need for logs entirely
